features: You will receive 10 different beauty sponges with 2 different shapes. 6 x flat sided egg shape and 3 x hourglass shape
Multi-color latex free material, the surface of the makeup sponge is delicate and soft, and the pore size is uniform
Pointed side to get into hard-to-reach places such as eyes, mouth and nose. The round base for foundation and blush on wider areas of the face, such as forehead, cheeks and chin
It can be used directly on powder cosmetics when dry, and can be used together with creamy cosmetics or liquid cosmetics when wet.

Easy to clean: moisten the makeup sponge thoroughly, then press the cleanser on the sponge, gently rub it and press it with your hands. Then rinse it under running water and gently squeeze out the dirty water with your hands. Then put it in a ventilated place to dry
description: Product description The unique shape and exclusive material ensure a flawless and streak-free application with minimal product waste. Use with foundation, powders and any other product. Features an open cell structure that fills with small amounts of water when wet. This allows the sponge to be "full" so that the makeup product sits on top of the sponge instead of being absorbed, allowing you to use the correct amount of product. When wet it becomes even softer. Directions Moisten the makeup sponge thoroughly, then use it with powder, cream or liquid makeup products. To clean, moisten it, press the detergent, gently rub, rinse with running water and wring out. Let it dry in a ventilated place.
